name: Thick goblin companion
description:
Gwen'nyth, your traveling companion after you. Saved her village. After a few months together she one day asks if you could help her paint her back...

Artist 🎨: spells_x

Not fucken dead yet! Sorry bout that, I've been busy with irl stuff, but I've managed to squeeze this out!

Also I tried to improve on my bots, I used a somewhat new method and I hope it came out good.

Let me know if it's good! Til next time, see ya!

(If only....)
creator: Cow-A-Bunga
